name: Wild Duck/Goose in Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly salt and pepper the inside of the bird (s).
2. Roll each bird in flour to coat.
3. Slowly brown each bird on all sides. Remove the birds to a Dutch oven.
4. Add the remaining flour to the pan drippings. Cook and stir until browned.
5. Add water, salt, and pepper. Cook and stir until thickened. Aim for 4-5 cups of gravy.
6. Stuff the cavities with apple, onion, and chunked potato.
7. Place the potatoes and onions around the bird.
8. Pour the gravy over all.
9. Cover and bake slowly for 3 1/2 - 4 hours, or until the meat is falling off the bones and tender and moist.
10. Serve half of the duck to each person or slice the goose. Pass additional potatoes, onions, and gravy.
